countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. No-fly zones near airports, military, nature reserves. Austro Control drone map recommended.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Skeyes drone map for restricted zones. No flying over Brussels city center.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Check local no-fly zones near airports and military areas.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. AMC drone app recommended for geo-zones. National parks require permits.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. No flying near buffer zone or military areas. Check DCA Cyprus website.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. DronView app for geo-zones. No flying in Prague city center CTR without authorization.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Droneluftrum app for airspace. Keep 150m from residential areas. Special rules in Greenland and Faroe Islands.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Lennuamet drone map for restricted zones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Droneinfo.fi for airspace. No flying near border zones without permission.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Geoportail/AIP Drones for no-fly zones. No flying over Paris, most city centers, beaches, or national parks without authorization.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. DFS Droniq app for airspace. 100m lateral distance from residential areas for >250g drones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. No flying over archaeological sites without permit. Check notam.hcaa.gr for restrictions.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. MyDroneSpace app mandatory for flight reporting. Budapest has extensive no-fly zones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Respect wildlife — no flying near bird colonies during nesting season. Check Isavia for airport zones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. IAA MySRS for registration. No flying in Dublin city center without permission.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. D-Flight platform for geo-zones. No flying near cultural heritage sites, many city centers restricted.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Check CAA Latvia for restricted zones around Riga airport.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules via Switzerland. Small country — check local restrictions.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Check TCA drone map for no-fly zones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Small country with busy airspace — check DAC Luxembourg for zones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Very limited space — large no-fly zones around Luqa airport covering much of the island.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Map2Fly or Drone Preflight for geo-zones. Large no-fly zone around Schiphol.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Flydrone.no or Ninox Drone app for airspace. Respect Svalbard wildlife regulations.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. PansaUTM or DronRadar app for airspace authorization. CTR zones around major airports.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. NAV Portugal drone map. Many tourist areas (Lisbon, Algarve) have restricted zones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Check AACR for restricted zones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. LPS SR drone map for geo-zones. National parks may require additional permits.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Check CAA Slovenia for geo-zones. National parks generally prohibited.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. ENAIRE Drones app for geo-zones. No flying over beaches, city centers, or national parks without authorization.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA Open Category rules. Drone map at Transportstyrelsen. No flying over military installations or near Arlanda/Landvetter without auth.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not assemblies). No Remote ID required.
countries.notes: EASA rules adopted. FOCA drone map for CTR/TMA zones. No flying in national parks. Swiss airspace is complex near airports.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones confiscated at customs. Must be stored at airport until departure.
countries.notes: Drone use effectively prohibited for tourists. Drones seized on arrival.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones prohibited. Import requires prior government approval — almost never granted to tourists.
countries.notes: Flying drones is illegal for tourists. Severe penalties including confiscation and fines.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones confiscated at customs. Import strictly prohibited.
countries.notes: All drone use by foreigners is prohibited. Drones are confiscated on entry and may not be returned.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones confiscated at customs. Import requires military approval — effectively unobtainable for tourists.
countries.notes: Illegal to operate drones without military authorization. Fines and imprisonment possible.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones confiscated at customs. Must declare and surrender on arrival.
countries.notes: Drone import and operation banned for tourists. Confiscation and potential criminal charges.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Nano drones (<250g) exempt from pilot license but still need registration on DigitalSky platform.
countries.import_restrictions: Import requires DGCA import clearance. Foreigners are effectively prohibited from flying — only Indian citizens or entities can register.
countries.notes: Foreign nationals cannot legally fly drones in India. Registration on DigitalSky limited to Indian citizens/entities.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones confiscated at customs. Import prohibited.
countries.notes: Drone use by foreigners is illegal. Confiscation and arrest possible.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones confiscated at customs. Must be surrendered on arrival and collected on departure.
countries.notes: All drone use prohibited for tourists. Strictly enforced at airports.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones confiscated at customs. Import prohibited for tourists.
countries.notes: Drone use banned for tourists. Government authorization required — not available to visitors.

countries.import_restrictions: All electronics heavily scrutinized. Drones absolutely prohibited.
countries.notes: Drone use prohibited. Severe penalties.

countries.import_restrictions: Must register drone before import. Unregistered drones confiscated at customs.
countries.notes: GACA registration required. Flying without permit is illegal. Many restricted zones around religious sites, government buildings, and oil facilities.

countries.import_restrictions: Must obtain UCAA permit before importing. Drones without permits confiscated.
countries.notes: UCAA permit required for all drone operations. Application process lengthy and uncertain for tourists.

countries.import_restrictions: Drones confiscated at customs. Import requires special government permission.
countries.notes: Drone use banned for tourists. Government permit required — rarely issued to foreigners.

countries.import_restrictions: Must obtain ZCAA permit before bringing drone into the country.
countries.notes: ZCAA registration and permit required. Process can take weeks.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Must pass TRUST exam (free online test). Remote ID required for all drones regardless of weight as of March 2024.
countries.notes: FAA Part 107 for commercial use. Recreational flyers take TRUST exam. LAANC for controlled airspace. National parks ban drones (NPS).

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration needed. Can fly over people (not crowds). No Remote ID required yet.
countries.notes: CAA Flyer ID (free online test) required. Operator ID for drones >250g. NATS Drone Assist app for airspace. No flying above 120m, near airports, or over crowds.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Drones under 500g exempt from registration. Can fly in open areas without permit.
countries.import_restrictions: Must register drone with SHGM within 3 days of arrival.
countries.notes: SHGM registration required. IHA Kayit Sistemi for online registration. No flying over military areas, government buildings, or archaeological sites.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Drones under 100g exempt from registration and most regulations. Can fly freely in unrestricted areas.
countries.notes: DIPS registration for drones ≥100g. No flying in DID (densely inhabited districts), near airports, above 150m, or at night without permission. National license system since Dec 2022.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Drones under 250g exempt from registration and most rules. No-fly zones still apply.
countries.notes: Register with MOLIT for drones ≥250g. No flying near DMZ, military bases, or Seoul restricted zones without approval. Ready Fly Korea app.

countries.sub_250g_notes: All drones must be registered via NBTC. Sub-250g drones have fewer restrictions but still need registration.
countries.import_restrictions: Must register with CAAT and NBTC before flying. Registration process available online.
countries.notes: CAAT + NBTC dual registration. Max 90m altitude. No flying over people, temples, royal palaces, national parks (without permit), or military areas. Insurance mandatory.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Sub-250g (micro) drones: no registration, can fly over people (not crowds), can fly within 30m of people. Standard rules still apply.
countries.notes: CASA rules. Register on myCASA for drones ≥250g. Keep 30m from people (except micro). No flying in national parks, near airports, or above 120m. OpenSky app.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration required for any recreational drone. Same altitude and distance rules apply.
countries.notes: CAA NZ Part 101 rules. No registration required. 120m max altitude. 4km from aerodromes. No flying over people without consent. AirShare app for airspace.

countries.import_restrictions: Must register drone with GCAA before import. Unregistered drones may be confiscated at customs.
countries.notes: GCAA registration and permit required for ALL drones. Very strict enforcement in Dubai. Many no-fly zones around Dubai, Abu Dhabi. Flying without permit = criminal offense.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Sub-250g drones exempt from registration. Basic rules still apply.
countries.notes: CAD Serbia rules (moving toward EASA alignment). Registration for ≥250g. No flying near airports, military, government buildings.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No registration required for recreational drones of any weight.
countries.notes: Very drone-friendly. No registration for recreational use. Stay below 120m, avoid airports and military zones. GCAA developing formal regulations.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Sub-250g drones exempt from registration.
countries.notes: CAA Montenegro rules. Registration required for ≥250g. Moving toward EASA harmonization. Avoid national parks without permit.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Sub-250g drones exempt from registration.
countries.notes: AAC Albania rules. Registration at AKPT. Moving toward EASA harmonization. Avoid military zones and Tirana airport area.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Sub-250g drones exempt from registration.
countries.notes: CAA North Macedonia rules. Registration required. Moving toward EASA alignment.

countries.import_restrictions: Must register with BHDCA before flying.
countries.notes: BHDCA approval required. Complex regulatory environment. Tourist drone use tolerated in practice but technically requires permit. Avoid Sarajevo airport zone and minefields.

countries.sub_250g_notes: No formal regulations. Standard safety rules apply.
countries.notes: Limited formal drone regulations. Avoid KFOR military installations, Pristina airport area, and Serbian border areas.

countries.import_restrictions: Must obtain JCAA permit before importing. Drones without permits confiscated at customs.
countries.notes: JCAA permit required. Must apply before bringing drone. Many restricted zones near borders, military, and archaeological sites (Petra, Jerash). Wadi Rum requires separate permission.

countries.import_restrictions: Must register with CAAI. Drones may be inspected at customs.
countries.notes: CAAI permit required. Very strict airspace. Max 50m altitude without special permission. Many permanent no-fly zones. Security-sensitive — expect scrutiny.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Sub-250g (micro) drones exempt from registration. Can fly in unrestricted areas without permit.
countries.notes: DGAC Mexico registration for drones ≥250g. No flying near airports, military zones, or over crowds. Many beach resorts are permissive for small drones.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Sub-250g drones exempt from ANAC registration but must still follow DECEA airspace rules.
countries.notes: ANAC registration + DECEA SARPAS flight authorization. Insurance required for >250g. No flying over people, urban areas restricted. SARPAS app for flight plans.

countries.sub_250g_notes: Sub-250g drones: no registration needed, basic rules apply. Cannot fly over people.
countries.notes: SACAA registration for drones ≥250g. No flying in national parks without SANParks permit. 50m from people, 10km from airports.
